entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: Gossypium hirsutum L., the crop being studied for drought tolerance and yielding potential

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of cotton genotypes to maintain growth and yield under water limiting conditions

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Water limiting or water deficit conditions imposed during vegetative, squaring, and boll development stages

entities.name: FACTORIAL RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to screen 21 cotton genotypes with three replications

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL STABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A physiological trait that decreases with increased water stress and correlates with yield

entities.name: RELATIVE WATER CONTENT
entities.description: A physiological trait that decreases with increased water stress and correlates with yield

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity parameters of cotton genotypes used to identify tolerant genotypes

entities.name: FLOWER DROP
entities.description: A morphological trait where a minimum number indicates drought tolerance

entities.name: DROUGHT RESPONSIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes associated with drought response used for future crop improvement

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMME
entities.description: The systematic effort to improve cotton genotypes using drought responsive genes
